title: Edi Rama’s greatest achievement: Convincing the West he is Albania
summary_full: Western admirers speak about Rama as if he were not merely governing Albania but personally dragging it into the twenty-first century. That is precisely the problem
summary_public: Western admirers speak about Rama as if he were not merely governing Albania but personally dragging it into the twenty-first century. That is precisely the problem
